section_miscategorizations.text: The patient has coronary artery disease, diabetes, and reports experiencing orthostatic dizziness.
section_miscategorizations.reason: The diagnoses (coronary artery disease, diabetes) and problem synthesis belong in Assessment, but the phrase 'reports experiencing orthostatic dizziness' is subjective history and would more cleanly fit in Subjective. This is an organizational issue and does not substantially mislead the reader.
